title: Smart PvP pack
description:
this is a pvp pack
all version are 1.16-latest
all amror are changed and item
netherite,diamond,iron,gold,chain,wood,stone
body:
This time I present you Smart PvP pack.
This is a texture pack gives a simple texture for the armor,sword and tools in minecraft
it's gives you new look and new and simple way of pvp armors


Optifine required
otherwise this pack doesn't work properly.

changes in minecraft after applying the pack.

changes are:-

1)Netherite Tools
2)Netherite Sword
3)Diamond Tools
4)Diamond Sword
5)Iron Tools
6)Iron Sword
7)Shield
8)Gold Tools
9)Gold Sword
10)Stone Tools
11)Stone Sword
12)Wooden Tools
13)Wooden Sword
14)Netherite Armor
15)Diamond Armor
16)Golden Armor
17)Iron Armor
18)Chain Armor
19)Leather Armor
20)Apple
21)Golden Apple
22)Enchanted Golden Apple
23)Totem
24)Turtle Helmet
24)All Mob Effect
25)All Painting

this pack is supported both single player world and multiplayer servers.


version supported
form- 1.16-1.20.1

make sure you check the file version before downloading the pack
all versions have separate files


Enjoy the "Smart PvP Pack".


THANKS FOR DOWNLOAD.
